mapper.select:
/* FamilyMgmtMapper.getFamilyMemberList */
SELECT MEM.FAM_SEQ , MEM.SEQ , MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO , MEM.MEM_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9047', MEM.MEM_TYPE) AS MEM_TYPE_NM , MEM.CHILD_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9048', MEM.CHILD_TYPE) AS CHILD_TYPE_NM , JUO.SUB_LINK_NAME , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JUO.CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , FN_GET_AGE_NEW(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JUO.CUSTOMER_SSN)) AS AGE , JUO.SUBSCRIBER_NO , MEM.USE_YN , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9045', MEM.USE_YN) AS USE_YN_NM , MEM.STRT_DTTM , MEM.END_DTTM , MEM.END_CODE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9049', MEM.END_CODE) AS END_CODE_NM , MEM.END_MSG , NVL(FN_GET_USRNM(MEM.REGST_ID), MEM.REGST_ID) AS REGST_ID , TO_CHAR(MEM.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DTTM , NVL(FN_GET_USRNM(MEM.RVISN_ID), MEM.RVISN_ID) AS RVISN_ID , TO_CHAR(MEM.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MEM MEM , ( SELECT SUB.SVC_CNTR_NO , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO , CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO CUS WHERE SUB.CUSTOMER_ID = CUS.CUSTOMER_ID ) JUO WHERE MEM.FAM_SEQ = #{famSeq} AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = JUO.SVC_CNTR_NO (+) ORDER BY MEM.SEQ

/* FamilyMgmtMapper.isFamilyMemberParent */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_YN FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MST MST , MSP_FAM_REL_MEM MEM WHERE MST.FAM_SEQ = MEM.FAM_SEQ AND MST.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.MEM_TYPE = '10' AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}

/* FamilyMgmtMapper.isFamilyMemberChild */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS USE_YN FROM MSP_FAM_REL_MST MST , MSP_FAM_REL_MEM MEM WHERE MST.FAM_SEQ = MEM.FAM_SEQ AND MST.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.USE_YN = 'Y' AND MEM.MEM_TYPE = '20' AND MEM.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
